summary:
Comprehensive implementation plan for revamping the Project Sandbox UI/UX using the SHE (Simplicity, Hide, Embody) approach. Covers 5 major components:
1. Data model updates — new BackdateEntry type with link ref, ref count, timestamps, campaign ID, and campaign name fields
2. Visual hierarchy revamp across all tabs — simplified navigation, progressive disclosure, self-explanatory interfaces
3. CSV/Excel backdate upload redesign — new 6-column format (link ref, ref count, startTimestamp, endTimestamp, ID, adCampName) with template download and preview
4. History tab split — before connection (backdate/retrospective data) vs after connection (live/immutable data) with a prominent connection moment divider
5. Project list polish — stronger tab indicators, hover states, gradient connect button

Includes open questions about CSV behavior, campaign ID handling, and transaction visual interpretation.
